## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Environment

- Go version: [e.g., 1.22.0]
- Rust version: [e.g., 1.75.0]
- GPU model: [e.g., NVIDIA GeForce MX250]
- CUDA version: [e.g., 13.0]
- VRAM: [e.g., 2048 MiB]
- quarry version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
